description: Piping class B3C1: Carbon steel, ANSI Class 300, raised-face flanges, DN15–DN400. Higher-pressure service: steam, gas, hydrocarbons at elevated pressure and temperature.
material_fittings: ASTM A234 WPB (BW fittings), ASTM A105 (forgings), ASTM A216 WCB (castings)
boltMaterial: ASTM A193 B7 studs + A194 2H nuts
